auto_rules.description: When mode=auto, Cassius picks based on these conditions
prefer_day_when: Portfolio has >3 positions approaching stop loss
prefer_swing_when: VIX < 20 (low volatility = hold and let winners run)
Strong trend in core positions (why exit?)
Default — swing is the safer baseline

last_mode_reason: Mode locked to swing. VIX 25.2 borderline but no override set.
